title: USCIS redesigns processing times webpage and tests new way of calculating processing times
description_html: USCIS launches a website pilot to display processing time data in an easier-to-read format and also tests a new way of collecting data and calculating the processing times for Form N-400 (Naturalization), Form I-90 (Replace Permanent Resident Card), Form I-485 (Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status), and Form I-751 (Remove Conditions on Residence). The updated website shows the time it takes to complete 50 percent of cases, and the time it takes to complete 93 percent of cases. [ID #875]
